---
name: Feature request 💡
about: Suggest a new idea, tool, or enhancement for ScaffoldKit
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### 🚀 The Problem
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when the AI tries to..." -->

### 💡 The Solution
<!-- Describe the specific feature, MCP tool, or configuration you'd like to see added. -->

### 🔄 Alternatives Considered
<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered. -->

### 🛠️ Are you willing to submit a PR?
<!-- Let us know if you'd like to build this yourself! We are happy to guide you on the "Spring Way" to implement it. -->
- [ ] Yes, I would like to build this and submit a PR.
- [ ] No, I just wanted to suggest the idea.
